rawMetadata: {"compiler":{"version":"0.8.30+commit.73712a01"},"language":"Solidity","output":{"abi":[],"devdoc":{"details":"A library for working with mutable byte buffers in Solidity. Byte buffers are mutable and expandable, and provide a variety of primitives for writing to them. At any time you can fetch a bytes object containing the current contents of the buffer.
